title: It Almost Worked
lyrics:
Everyone looks the same in this town
You can hardly tell the difference
She stayed at home and figured out how
To will herself out of existence
She gave it a try
She closed her eyes
She didn't know how it'd feel, she just hoped that it wouldn't hurt
It almost worked
They lie right to your face in this town
But what did you expect?
She wishes that she could have seen what they saw
That left them so unimpressed
So she gave it a try
She started to cry
She said to herself, "Well, at least it could have been worse"
And it almost worked

title: Hate Yourself
lyrics:
You, you'd fall in love with anyone
I think you'd fall in love with anyone
Who fell in love with you
And they frequently do
So take comfort
Cruel comfort
Before you start to wonder
How you got locked inside your room
And how long will it take before you start to hate yourself
And go straight to the arms of someone else?
And I'll just wait 'til those arms belong to me and I'm not
Saying that you love me, I'm not saying anything
♪
Tell me, do you let them down gently?
Does it only make it harder
To let the feeling linger
To drag it out a little longer?
Does it put your mind at ease?
But you're the one who brought 'em here
You're the one who has to take 'em when you leave
And how long will it take before you start to hate yourself
And go straight to the arms of someone else?
And I'll just wait 'til those arms belong to me and I'm not
Saying that you love me, I'm not saying anything

Some vodka that'll jump-start my heart quicker

Feel the tension soon as someone mentions me

title: Anime T-Shirt
lyrics:
[Intro - soft]
Funny how one shirt
can change everything...

[Verse 1]
First day of grade eight, new halls, same nerves
Walked in with my bro not expecting what occurs
Then something caught my eye across the crowded room
An anime shirt glowing like a light in the gloom
My bro nudged my shoulder, said go on just say hi
We walked over nervous, asked her what she'd seen
She smiled back easy like she'd known us all along
And just like that a quiet friendship came along

[Pre-Chorus]
Nothing more than classmates
Passing notes and corridor glances
I kept telling myself
I'd wait for better chances

[Chorus]
But the whole year slipped like sand
Right through my open hand
Never said the words I meant to say
She was right there every day
Just a hallway, just a smile
I been thinking for a while
Maybe I should've stayed
Instead of watching from away

[Verse 2]
Grade nine came around and the sections split apart
Different classrooms, different halls but same place in my heart
Started catching glimpses just to get me through the day
A second in the corridor was enough to make my day
Grade ten the same routine, eyes searching every crowd
Her laugh would hit different even when it wasn't loud
Sat through every class just counting down to break
Every little moment more than I could take

[Pre-Chorus]
Nothing more than glances
Across a busy courtyard
I kept telling myself
Next time wouldn't be so hard

[Chorus]
But the whole year slipped like sand
Right through my open hand
Never said the words I meant to say
She was right there every day
Just a hallway, just a smile
I been thinking for a while
Maybe I should've stayed
Instead of watching from away

[Bridge - quiet, reflective]
Last exam of grade ten
Pencils down, chairs scraping back
Saw her walking out the building
And she never looked back
Didn't know that was the last time
Didn't know the clock had stopped
All the words I saved for someday
In that hallway got dropped
Now I'm grade eleven sitting
With a story half unwritten
About a girl in an anime shirt
And a boy too scared to listen

[Outro - fading]
Maybe in another life
I walk up on that first day
Look her in the eyes and say
Hey... nice shirt
I watch the same shows too...

title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
lyrics:
[Intro - whispered]
I never even told her my real name...
and she already knew me better than anyone...

[Verse 1]
I found a diary I was never meant to read
Living With Dying written small in cherry seeds
She smiled like the world wasn't ending in her chest
Sakura kept dancing while I stood motionless
I never wanted friends, I lived inside my books
But she sat down beside me with those warm familiar looks
Said you're the only one who knows my secret now
So stick around a little while and I'll show you how

[Pre-Chorus]
She wasn't scared of dying
She was scared of being forgotten
I was scared of living
We were both a little broken

[Chorus]
Sakura in the springtime
Falling petals, fading light
You were eating every moment
Making memories before the night
You said you wanted my pancreas
To become a part of me
But I already gave you everything
You just couldn't see
Sakura... Sakura...
Why did you leave before the summer came
Sakura... Sakura...
I never even got to say your name

[Verse 2]
Kyoko never liked me standing by your side
Said I wasn't good enough to be your final guide
But you just laughed and grabbed my sleeve and pulled me through the door
Said boring boy has got a heart worth fighting for
We ate together, walked together, shared those quiet days
Your bucket list was filling up in soft and gentle ways
I wrote you letters I was too afraid to send
Never thought the story'd break before it reached the end

[Pre-Chorus]
She wasn't scared of dying
She was scared of being forgotten
I was scared of living
We were both a little broken

[Chorus]
Sakura in the springtime
Falling petals, fading light
You were eating every moment
Making memories before the night
You said you wanted my pancreas
To become a part of me
But I already gave you everything
You just couldn't see
Sakura... Sakura...
Why did you leave before the summer came
Sakura... Sakura...
I never even got to say your name

[Bridge - slow, breaking]
It wasn't the disease that took you in the end
Just a random cruel world that refused to let you mend
I read your final letter on the floor beside your door
You said you liked me most of all
I couldn't ask for more
You wanted me to live, to feel, to finally be free
Sakura you were eating my pancreas
And I let you
Because you were the only one
Who ever wanted to know me

[Outro - barely a whisper]
I finally told Kyoko my name today...
She cried...
I think you would have laughed...
Cherry blossoms fall every year...
But there was only one Sakura...
I want to eat your pancreas...
means I want to be with you forever...
and I do...
I really do...

title: Harem King
lyrics:
[Intro - spoken]
Season five was supposed to be everything...
Issei dying... coming back with white hair...
The proposal... Cardinal Crimson...
We never got to see any of it animated...
Ddraig... we were robbed.

[Verse 1]
Died a virgin in the rain, Raynare took his life
Reborn as a devil, Rias pulled him from the night
Crimson hair, crimson wings, she was way out of his league
But Issei said I'll protect you, took a vow on bended knee
Asia healing every wound with that warm sacred shine
Akeno laughing in the thunder falling into the shrine
Koneko curled up small, Xenovia with no shame
Straight up asked him for his bloodline, yeah she came with no games

[Pre-Chorus]
Dress Break activated, fabric hits the floor
Bilingual whispering secrets only oppai know the score
Every devil every angel falling into his orbit
Harem King was the dream and he was almost at the surface

[Chorus]
Harem King, harem king, he was so damn close
Rias on his arm, Akeno giving him the most
Season five was supposed to show us everything we bled for
Issei in white hair, the moment that we need more
We never saw the proposal down on bended knee
Never saw Cardinal Crimson set the whole world free
Harem King, harem king, Ddraig crying in the gear
Season five was right there and then it disappeared

[Verse 2]
Rizevim Livan Lucifer running Qlippoth cold
Lucifer's own son turned villain, darkest story ever told
Lilith walking round like Ophis but with evil in her eyes
The clone arc was getting serious before our show died
Issei took a hit so hard he left his body behind
Came back as a humanoid dragon, white hair, new design
That moment in the novels had the whole fandom shaking
But without the animation our hearts kept on breaking
He stood before his girls different, reborn in a new frame
Rias ran to hold him crying softly calling out his name
We read it in the light novel, yeah we cried at every page
But animated Issei reborn would've been the age

[Pre-Chorus]
Dress Break activated, fabric hits the floor
Bilingual whispering secrets only oppai know the score
Every devil every angel falling into his orbit
Harem King was the dream and he was almost at the surface

[Chorus]
Harem King, harem king, he was so damn close
Rias on his arm, Akeno giving him the most
Season five was supposed to show us everything we bled for
Issei in white hair, the moment that we need more
We never saw the proposal down on bended knee
Never saw Cardinal Crimson set the whole world free
Harem King, harem king, Ddraig crying in the gear
Season five was right there and then it disappeared

[Bridge - hard]
Cardinal Crimson Full Drive never hit the screen
The greatest power up in DxD history unseen
Trihexa unleashed on the world, three factions going to war
Great Red flying through the gap, that's what we needed more
Issei becoming High Class Devil earning every rank
The harem fully assembled, every girl we have to thank
Rias getting that ring, the moment that defined the series
But Passione went silent and the whole fandom still fears this
Will we ever see it animated, will we ever get the call
Or is High School DxD just gonna fade behind that wall

[Outro - slow, broken]
White hair Issei... never animated
Cardinal Crimson... never activated on screen
The proposal... still just words on a page
Harem King title... sitting on an empty stage
Ddraig whispers boost one final time...
...but the screen stays black
Season five...
The crown was right there Issei
The crown was right there
...we're still waiting

title: Burn Through the Dark
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Woke up with nothing but scars on my hands
Built every bridge just to watch it collapse
The world keeps spinning but I'm standing still
Fighting the demons that feed on my will

[Pre-Chorus]
I've been down in the fire
I've been swallowed by the night
But something deep inside me
Won't surrender without a fight

[Chorus]
I'll burn through the dark
I'll tear through the rain
No chain can hold me
No ghost can remain
I rise from the ash
I bleed but I stand
I'll burn through the dark
Till I reach the promised land

[Verse 2]
They said I'd fall and they watched me crawl
But every scar built the strongest wall
The clock ticks loud like a war machine
I'll write my name on the pages unseen

[Pre-Chorus]
I've been down in the fire
I've been swallowed by the night
But something deep inside me
Won't surrender without a fight

[Chorus]
I'll burn through the dark
I'll tear through the rain
No chain can hold me
No ghost can remain
I rise from the ash
I bleed but I stand
I'll burn through the dark
Till I reach the promised land

[Bridge]
This is not the end
This is where I begin
Every broken bone
Made me whole again
The darkness feeds the flame
The pain screams my name
But I am not a victim
I am the game

[Chorus]
I'll burn through the dark
I'll tear through the rain
No chain can hold me
No ghost can remain
I rise from the ash
I bleed but I stand
I'll burn through the dark
Till I reach the promised land

[Outro]
I burn... I rise... I stand...

title: Sigma Crash Out V2
lyrics:
[Intro - spoken, deadpan]
Day one of my glow up...
Searched "how to be alpha"...
Got an ad for a body pillow...
This is fine...
[Verse 1]
Woke up and chose violence hit the door frame first
Told myself I'm that guy then remembered my net worth
Ate a raw carrot called it clean eating day
Posted gym selfie from 2019 anyway
Tried the Andrew Tate walk down the hallway
Slipped on a sock did the splits in the doorway
Bro said you're cooked I said nah I'm just rare
Showed up to school with a sigma rizz stare
Teacher asked the answer I said it is what it is
She said get out I said understood the business
Put on my playlist of dark phonk at full blast
Phone speaker so quiet it just wheezed and collapsed
[Chorus]
Skibidi skibidi I am built different
Everything I touch becomes a different incident
But I rise like a phoenix from my bedroom floor
Stubbed the same toe on the same chair once more
Ohio Ohio I am from the rizz
Lost my dignity but gained analysis
W rizz W grind W fall down stairs
I am that sigma male I am almost there
[Verse 2]
Downloaded brain rot content for research purposes
Watched it for six hours for academic services
Told my mom I'm networking on YouTube shorts
She unplugged the router and dismissed the courts
Tried to cook ramen like a five star chef
Added chocolate milk read the recipe left
Gordon Ramsay appeared in my head and said
This is so raw it still has its feelings and legs
Made a workout plan on a Google sheet
Opened it once then accepted defeat
Searched how to get abs while eating a chip
Watched the whole video and double dipped
My gym membership collecting digital dust
My protein powder turned to sediment crust
Did one push up said that's enough for the week
Posted grind never stops then fell asleep
[Bridge - fast]
My wifi said no in the middle of a game
Rage quit so hard I forgot my own name
Told bro I was sigma he said which one
I said the lonely one he said yeah that's the one
Tried the ice bath trend filled it up cold
Sat on the edge for forty minutes bold
Put one foot in said nah this ain't it
Drained the whole tub and called it a sit
Saw a cat video cried for eleven minutes
Called it emotional intelligence and meant it
